notes: Run npm run fetch:data and npm run convert:data to generate production data files from Taipei Open Data CSV resources.
Fetch script stores raw CSV files locally and avoids repeat downloads unless --force is passed.
Chinese friendly-store records are preserved even when no English match is found.
Restaurant matching is best effort and avoids labeling unmatched businesses as not friendly.
Water refill availability and operation should be verified on site.

downloads.notes: Downloaded CSV resource directly from Taipei Open Data resource.download endpoint.
